§6Circuits§f

§aThe first soldered circuit board — gateway to all advanced machinery.§f

The §bAnalog Circuit Board§f is the first circuit made in the §bSoldering Station§f. It is required for the chemical plant, arc furnace, and many mid-game machines.

§6Recipe§f:
Check JEI at the Soldering Station. Expect to need: capacitors, vacuum tubes, PCBs, lead wires, and power (2 kHE/s for 5s).

§eTip§f: Start automating capacitor and PCB production early. Higher circuit tiers consume them by the stack. Make sure you have a Soldering Station built first.
